nasb.text: Why then has this people, Jerusalem, Turned away in continual apostasy? They hold fast to deceit, They refuse to return.

esv.text: Why then has this people turned away in perpetual backsliding? They hold fast to deceit; they refuse to return.

cnv.text: 這人民為甚麼背道， 耶路撒冷為甚麼長久偏離？ 他們定意行詭詐， 不肯回轉。

ccb.text: 为什么耶路撒冷的居民一味地背叛我？ 他们诡诈成性，不肯回头。
